roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE (TO SET) FILED
/INTC/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/DEF:IS NO LONGER REQUIRED TO BE ONELECTRONIC MONITORING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 08-14-19/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL/INTC/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,17006325,/

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/INTC/LDTR:08-16-19/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL: TRIAL AND DEFENSE'S BAIL MOTION/DAWT/X: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR O,R, IS CONTINUED/CONTD: TRIAL, DEFENSE'S BAIL MOTION AND STATUS OF FELONY 19011488/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/X: DEFENSE'S MOTION TODISMISS COUNTS 1 AND 2 PER PC 991 IS DENIED WITHOUTPREJUDICE/X: DEFENSE'SMOTION FOR RELEASE ON ACM IS GRANTED/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO CHECK IN WITH ACM TWO TIMES PER WEEK IN PERSON AND TWOTIMES A WEEK BY PHONE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BYTHE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BYTHE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THENEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/LDTR: 08-16-19/987,2//CONTD:MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 08-02-19/CONTD: TRIAL ON 08-08-19/DOP/
